description: This file defines the UserController class which handles HTTP requests related to user management, including listing, retrieving, creating, updating, and deleting users. It leverages Spring Boot annotations for REST endpoints and Swagger annotations for API documentation.

classes.name: UserController
classes.description: REST controller managing user-related endpoints, including CRUD operations on User entities.

methods.name: list
methods.description: Handles GET requests to list users with optional filtering by active status, returns paginated list.

methods.name: get
methods.description: Handles GET requests to retrieve a user by ID.

methods.name: create
methods.description: Handles POST requests to create a new user with data provided in the request body.

methods.name: update
methods.description: Handles PUT requests to update an existing user identified by ID.

methods.name: delete
methods.description: Handles DELETE requests to remove a user by ID.
